basicDetails.schemeName: Scheme for Establishment of Hi-Tech and Mini Dairy Units under Mukhya Mantri Antyodaya Parivaar Utthan Yojana
basicDetails.implementingAgency: Department Of Animal Husbandry & Dairying, Government Of Haryana

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Scheme for Establishment of Hi-Tech and Mini Dairy Units under Mukhya Mantri Antyodaya Parivaar Utthan Yojana (MMAPUY)” is implemented by the Department of Animal Husbandry &amp; Dairying, Government of Haryana. Under this scheme, a resident of Haryana who is between 18 and 60 years of age can avail a 25% subsidy on the cost of two milch animals. The subsidy can be availed as a loan for the purchase of these milch animals by the beneficiary for the establishment of dairy units with two milch animals.
schemeContent.benefits_md:
> **Financial Assistance under the Scheme:**

**Dairy units of 2 milch animals:**

  - 25 % subsidy on the cost of milch animals which has been availed as a loan for the purchase of these milch animals by the beneficiary for the establishment of dairy units of 2 milch animals;

> **Financial Assistance for Insurance under the Scheme:**


- Insurance assistance will be provided as per the available departmental scheme if operational during the year; otherwise, the beneficiaries will have to arrange for insurance of animals and shall pay the insurance premium.
schemeContent.exclusions_md: 1. Any group/firm/organization will not be permitted to apply under the Scheme, as the Scheme is individual beneficiary-oriented.
schemeContent.briefDescription: Under this scheme, a resident of Haryana who is between 18 and 60 years of age can avail a 25% subsidy on the cost of two milch animals. The subsidy can be availed as a loan for the purchase of these milch animals by the beneficiary for the establishment of dairy units with two milch animals.

children.text: The scheme “Scheme for Establishment of Hi-Tech and Mini Dairy Units under Mukhya Mantri Antyodaya Parivaar Utthan Yojana (MMAPUY)” is implemented by the Department of Animal Husbandry & Dairying, Government of Haryana. Under this scheme, a resident of Haryana who is between 18 and 60 years of age can avail a 25% subsidy on the cost of two milch animals. The subsidy can be availed as a loan for the purchase of these milch animals by the beneficiary for the establishment of dairy units with two milch animals.
Financial Assistance under the Scheme:
Dairy units of 2 milch animals:
25 % subsidy on the cost of milch animals which has been availed as a loan for the purchase of these milch animals by the beneficiary for the establishment of dairy units of 2 milch animals;
Financial Assistance for Insurance under the Scheme:

Insurance assistance will be provided as per the available departmental scheme if operational during the year; otherwise, the beneficiaries will have to arrange for insurance of animals and shall pay the insurance premium.
Any group/firm/organization will not be permitted to apply under the Scheme, as the Scheme is individual beneficiary-oriented.
Step 01:
To avail the benefits of the scheme, applicants should visit the Deputy Director's office in their district and collect the application form.
Step 02:
Fill out the application form and attach all the relevant documents.
Step 03:
Submit the completely filled application form and attached documents to the concerned official in the office.
Step 04:
The Deputy Director of the concerned district will examine the applications on a first-come, first-served basis and process them accordingly.

applicationProcess.process_md:
**Step 01:** To avail the benefits of the scheme, applicants should visit the Deputy Director&#39;s office in their district and collect the application form.
**Step 02:** Fill out the application form and attach all the relevant documents.
**Step 03:** Submit the completely filled application form and attached documents to the concerned official in the office.
**Step 04:** The Deputy Director of the concerned district will examine the applications on a first-come, first-served basis and process them accordingly.

children.text: The applicant may submit the application through Common Service Centres, Antodaya Kendra, Atal Sewa Kendra, e-disha Centres or any other such centre.

applicationProcess.process_md: The applicant may submit the application through Common Service Centres, Antodaya Kendra, Atal Sewa Kendra, e-disha Centres or any other such centre.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The applicant should be of 18 to 60 years of age and a resident of Haryana.
   1. The applicant must be unemployed.
   1. There would be no mandatory educational qualifications or training requirements.
   1. The applicant can apply for a dairy unit of 2 Milch animals only.
   1. The applicant should have space/shed for keeping milch animals.
   1. The applicant would have to submit a Self-Declaration for being unemployed and for undertaking to abide by other conditions as required under the Scheme.

children.text: The applicant should be of 18 to 60 years of age and a resident of Haryana.
The applicant must be unemployed.
There would be no mandatory educational qualifications or training requirements.
The applicant can apply for a dairy unit of 2 Milch animals only.
The applicant should have space/shed for keeping milch animals.
The applicant would have to submit a Self-Declaration for being unemployed and for undertaking to abide by other conditions as required under the Scheme.
